description_long: This is a rugged hiking boot featuring a high ankle collar for support and protection, with a durable, thick rubber sole designed for traction on uneven surfaces. The upper is constructed from a combination of tan and gray synthetic or leather materials, reinforced at the toe and heel for added durability. The boot is secured with a standard criss-cross lacing system using metal eyelets and hooks, ensuring a snug fit. The tread on the sole is deeply lugged, providing excellent grip for outdoor or urban terrain. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the overall build suggests it is intended for heavy-duty use in urban or natural environments. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A sturdy, tan and gray hiking boot with a high ankle collar, thick lugged sole, and criss-cross lacing. Built for durability and traction in urban or outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high ankle collar, criss-cross lacing, and reinforced toe cap.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the thick, lugged sole and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar and the seamless back panel.
description_view_3: Left side view reveals the full length of the sole and the side profile of the lacing system.
